description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named container_scanning in the test stage. Use the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/analyzers/klar:$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MAJOR-$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MINOR-stable with an empty entrypoint, and add the service arminc/clair-db:$CLAIR_DB_IMAGE_TAG aliased as clair-vulnerabilities-db. Set the variables CLAIR_DB_IMAGE_TAG=latest and GIT_STRATEGY=none. The job runs the command /container-scanner/start.sh, allows failure, and uploads the gl-container-scanning-report.json file as a container_scanning artifact. It runs only on branch refs and when $GITLAB_FEATURES matches the container_scanning feature, and is excluded if the $CONTAINER_SCANNING_DISABLED variable is set.
